---
title: 'No title'
author: '@chucc900'
date: "2019/9/27"
output: 
  html_document:
    css: rainbow.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

![](/Users/kings/Desktop/R/R projects/TidyTuesday/Week 39/diversity.png)

<span style="font-family:Nimrod">For this week's \#TidyTuesday, I explored the changes in racial diversities in school across U.S. states. It is clear that more schools become more <u class="rainbow">racial-diverse</u> compared to 1990s. However, numerous schools are still being classified as <i style = "color:red">Undiverse</i>.</span>
